title: Vibrant German Pumpernickel Flatbread
description: A mustardy, light flatbread with a dark brown sugar twist, perfect for a lazy Sunday and diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Dissolve yeast and dark brown sugar in warm water and let sit 10 minutes until frothy.
Combine pumpernickel flour and salt in a bowl and add the yeast mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise at room temperature for 12 hours.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a 10x12 inch rectangle; brush the surface with water and drizzle olive oil over it.
Evenly spread the dijon mustard over the dough and press it lightly into the surface.
Preheat the oven to 220°C and bake the flatbread for 15 minutes until golden and crisp.
Slice the flatbread and serve warm with a side of fresh dill yogurt.
